articles.title: $XRP Whale Wallets With Over 100 Million Tokens Reach 11-Week High, Data Shows
articles.description: The number of large whales on the XRP Ledger ($XRP), defined as wallet holders that have at least 100 million tokens worth of the cryptocurrency, has recently swelled to 199, reaching its highest point in nearly three months. The rise comes after XRP benefitted from a landmark ruling in the US that saw a federal […]

articles.title: Dogecoin (DOGE) Price Surges as Twitter Rebrandes to X.com
articles.description: Coinspeaker Dogecoin (DOGE) Price Surges as Twitter Rebrandes to X.com Over the last 30 days, Dogecoin has seen a surge of nearly 10%, including a 1.3% rise against the US dollar in the preceding week alone. Dogecoin (DOGE) Price Surges as Twitter Rebrandes to X.com

articles.title: Dogecoin Up More Than 5% In 24 hours
articles.description: Over the past 24 hours, Dogecoin's (CRYPTO: DOGE) price rose 5.21% to $0.08. This continues its positive trend over the past week where it has experienced a 9.0% gain, moving from $0.07 to its current price. As it stands right now, the coin's all-time high is $0.73. read more
